name: Kumail Nanjiani
blurb: He moved to the US at eighteen and built a comedy career before breaking out as Dinesh on HBOs Silicon Valley.
bio: Kumail Nanjiani is a Pakistani-American stand-up comedian, actor, and screenwriter. He moved to the US at eighteen and built a comedy career before breaking out as Dinesh on HBOs Silicon Valley. He co-wrote and starred in the semi-autobiographical film The Big Sick, which earned an Academy Award nomination for Best Original Screenplay.

timeline.ev: Graduates Grinnell College in computer science and philosophy
Comedy Central special Beta Male airs
Cast as Dinesh on HBOs Silicon Valley
Co-writes and stars in The Big Sick
Named to Time 100 most influential people

accolades: Academy Award nomination for Best Original Screenplay (The Big Sick)
Co-host of the Comedy Central show The Meltdown with Jonah and Kumail
